best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-listener-004 title: handle data collection for multiple tasks in the real-time database listener module: listener source pages: 5 preconditions: user has completed multiple tasks. test data: - hashmap: {"punti": 100, "missionid": 1, "tipid": 1} test steps: 1. add a listener for the "mission" and "tip" in the firebase sdk. 2. send the json data as a rest/http/2 request to the real-time database. 3. verify that the ondatachange() method is triggered for both "mission" and "tip". 4. check that the data change notifications are received. 5. verify that the requested data is collected and processed for both tasks. expected result: the requested data for both "mission" and "tip" should be collected and processed correctly, and the application should handle the data change notifications as expected.
